mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO failure_record
failure_code, device_part_code, device_part_name, failure_name, failure_phenomenon, failure_description, failure_notice_type, failure_type, failure_start_time, status, creator_username, creator_name, created_at, updated_at,
#{failureCode}, #{devicePartCode}, #{devicePartName}, #{failureName}, #{failurePhenomenon}, #{failureDescription}, #{failureNoticeType}, #{failureType}, #{failureStartTime}, #{status}, #{creatorUsername}, #{creatorName}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.select:
SELECT id, failure_code AS failureCode, device_part_code AS devicePartCode, device_part_name AS devicePartName, failure_name AS failureName, failure_phenomenon AS failurePhenomenon, failure_description AS failureDescription, failure_notice_type AS failureNoticeType, failure_type AS failureType, failure_start_time AS failureStartTime, status, creator_username AS creatorUsername, creator_name AS creatorName, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM failure_record WHERE id = #{id}
AND creator_username = #{creatorUsername}
